message: 🌱 Add istio: Istio sidecar injection failing with error - MountVolume.Set mission (#369)

@@ -0,0 +1,81 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "istio-22463-istio-sidecar-injection-failing-with-error-mountvolume-setup-failed-",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "istio: Istio sidecar injection failing with error - MountVolume.SetUp failed for volume \"istiod-ca-cert\" : configmap \"istio-ca-root-cert\" not found",
+    "description": "Istio sidecar injection failing with error - MountVolume.SetUp failed for volume \"istiod-ca-cert\" : configmap \"istio-ca-root-cert\" not found. This issue affects 37+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify istio troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your istio deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app=istio\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio -n cert-manager --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors related to: Istio sidecar injection failing with error - MountVolume.SetUp failed for volume \"istiod-ca-cert\" : configmap \"istio-ca-root-cert\" not found"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Check current Pod configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant istio resources:\n```bash\nkubectl get pod -A\nkubectl describe pod <name> -n <namespace>\n```\n**Bug Description**\nIstiod is not responding to new namespaces. Created a new namespace and labelled istio-injectio=enabled. I deployed one app to the namespace and the pod is stuck in init stage. Ist"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Istio sidecar injection failing with error - MountVolume.Set",
+        "description": "Might fix https://github.com/istio/istio/issues/22463, was found during\ndebugging this.\n\nhttps://github.com/istio/istio/pull/21669 made a change that set the\nstop channel to the global stop channel instead of leader election stop\nchannel, so it doesn't stop when leader is lost. Once that is fixed we\n```yaml\n# istioctl version\r\nclient version: 1.5.0\r\ncontrol plane version: 1.5.0\r\ndata plane version: 1.5.0 (17 proxies)\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Istio sidecar injection failing with error - Mount is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=istio -n cert-manager --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The root cause is: Might fix https://github.com/istio/istio/issues/22463, was found during\ndebugging this.\n\nhttps://github.com/istio/istio/pull/21669 made a change that set the\nstop channel to the global stop channel instead of leader election stop\nchannel, so it doesn't stop when leader is lost. Once that is fixed we\nneed to create new informers, or client-go will crash due to closing the\nsame informer twice. This fixes the issue because it addresses the underlying problem that was causing the failure.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "# istioctl version\r\nclient version: 1.5.0\r\ncontrol plane version: 1.5.0\r\ndata plane version: 1.5.0 (17 proxies)",
+        "# kubectl create namespace keycloak\r\nnamespace/keycloak created\r\n# kubectl label namespace keycloak istio-injection=enabled\r\nnamespace/keycloak labeled\r\n# kubectl describe namespaces keycloak\r\nName:         keycloak\r\nLabels:       istio-injection=enabled\r\nAnnotations:  <none>\r\nStatus:       Active\r\n\r\nNo resource quota.\r\n\r\nNo LimitRange resource.\r\n# kubectl get configmaps -n keycloak\r\nNo resources found in keycloak namespace.\r\n# kubectl get configmaps -n default\r\nNAME                 DATA   AGE\r\nistio-ca-root-cert   1      10d",
+        "istioctl manifest apply \\\r\n     --set values.grafana.enabled=true \\\r\n     --set values.prometheus.enabled=true \\\r\n     --set values.kiali.enabled=true --set values.kiali.createDemoSecret=true \\\r\n     --set values.global.proxy.accessLogFile=\"/dev/dtdout\""
+      ]
+    }
+  },
